d d d!d"d#d$d%d&d'd(d(d(d)d*d+d,d-
d.d/d/d
d0d0d1d1d2d2d3d3d3d4d4d5d5d6d7d7d7d8d
d9d:d;d<d=d>d?d?d?d
)BzN
Dutch-language mappings for language-dependent features of
reStructuredText.
